project_state: Deployed on GitHub Pages successfully. UI/UX modernized with Glassmorphism. User Manual tab fully embedded natively within the application.
pending_todos: Refactor inline CSS styles in index.html (specifically the User Manual section) into external styles.css to resolve IDE linting warnings.
Add vendor prefixes (e.g., -webkit-backdrop-filter) to CSS for cross-browser Safari compatibility.
Observe backend (Google Apps Script) load speed periodically to ensure no quotas are hit under multiple user concurrent loads.
technical_roadblocks: None at present. The GitHub Pages Jekyll build error and Submodule tracking issue have been fully resolved.
